mapper.select: SELECT id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS formatted_date, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS formatted_datetime FROM t_warn_record ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT index_type, GROUP_CONCAT(index_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS index_names, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t_warn_index WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY index_type
